violations.text: Cans/bottles were observed in the hand washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than handwashing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
The hand-washing sink in the back area was lacking paper towels and soap. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
Paint materials were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

Wood is used in the construction of mop sink in the back area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

Walk in cooler located in the front retail area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures). Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside back and dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
